enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Hare Rama Hare Krishna conveys themes of love and friendship, highlighting the playful dynamics between relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Poda Podi, this song is featured during a lively celebration, showcasing the characters' joyful moments together.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Dharan Kumar, who is also the music director, bringing his unique style to the track.

When was the song released?

Hare Rama Hare Krishna was released on October 12, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Hare Rama Hare Krishna from Poda Podi is a lively and upbeat track that encapsulates the joy of friendship and celebration. It features playful lyrics that reflect the carefree spirit of youth and love. The energetic performance by Dharan Kumar adds to the vibrant atmosphere, making it a perfect choice for parties and celebrations. Overall, the song evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to join in the fun.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Get ready to groove with Hare Rama Hare Krishna from the movie Poda Podi, a vibrant track that perfectly captures the essence of celebration and joy. With Dharan Kumar's energetic vocals and Vignesh Shivan's catchy lyrics, this song is a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits. Experience the infectious rhythm that makes this song a party anthem!
stanzaMeanings: Who are you? A friend? No. A fling? No. Who are you to me? Not a dream, not a relation.
When you say love, when you whisper it in my ear, when you say love, yeah yeah.
I will say love, I will whisper it in your ear, I will say love, yeah yeah.
Hare Rama Hare Krishna, save my love. Hare Rama Hare Krishna, save my love. Hare Rama... Hare Krishna... I'm asking, save my love.
Even if I call you 'podi', you will come running back to me. A cute kiss is enough.
Today, I want to convert you into my wife. I'm saying something mindful, oh yeah.
Don't make a scene over small fights. Don't make a scene when love is strong. Whether a thief or a child, you are my boyfriend.
Who are you? A friend? No. A fling? No. Who are you to me? Not a relation, not a dream.
When you and I are together, don't think that days will pass by just like that, yeah yeah.
When you say love (2), when you whisper it in my ear (2), if you come back to me (2), yeah yeah.
English Translation I tried my best :)
